title: Advanced airships
description: Uses Valkyrien Skies to achieve semi realistic airships and ships.
body:
Uses [**Valkyrien skies**](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) to achive semi realistic phisics for blocks and whith the help of the mod [**Eureka**](https://modrinth.com/mod/eureka) you can make physics bound airships or ships. Also has a bunch of structure improvement mods like.

world generation courtesy of:
- [**terrestria**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)
- [**traverse**](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse)
- [**cinderscapes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes)
- [**nullscape**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape)

You could make a fully working movable flying base or a ship base etc.
